message:
fix(runtime-compat): remove PolledAfterCompletion arm from semaphore error mapping

The asupersync::sync::AcquireError enum no longer has a
PolledAfterCompletion variant (removed upstream), so the match arm
handling it in Semaphore::map_acquire_error() is now dead code that
would fail to compile. Remove it to track the upstream API change.

The remaining two variants (Closed, Cancelled) provide complete coverage
of the current AcquireError enum.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
